hero.title: Academy
hero.tagline: Privacy education essentials: talks, courses, guides, and radio. Build your knowledge in Web3 privacy.

mission.text:
Academy provides curated privacy education: video talks, courses, guides, and radio.
Learn from experts and build privacy-preserving applications.

features.title: Radio & Podcasts
features.description: Listen to privacy discussions and interviews.

hero.title: Privacy Annual Report
hero.tagline: Annual research report on the state of privacy in Web3. Key findings, trends, and recommendations.

mission.text:
The Privacy Annual Report summarizes the year in Web3 privacy: projects, research, events,
and emerging trends. A must-read for the community.

hero.title: Photo Anonymity Blur Tool
hero.tagline: Tool for anonymizing faces and sensitive content in images. Open source.

mission.text:
The Blur Tool helps anonymize faces and sensitive content in photos. Useful for
privacy-preserving documentation and reporting.

hero.title: Hackathon Curation Pack
hero.tagline: Curated pack of resources for privacy-focused hackathons. Tools, docs, inspiration.

mission.text:
The Hackathon Pack bundles resources—use cases, tools, guides—for organizers and participants
of privacy hackathons.

hero.title: Privacy Projects Hiring
hero.tagline: Research on hiring trends and opportunities in privacy projects. Find talent, find roles.

mission.text:
Privacy Projects Hiring research explores hiring trends, open positions, and talent needs
across the privacy ecosystem.

hero.title: Privacy Use-Case Generator
hero.tagline: Generate privacy use-case ideas. Ideation tool for builders and researchers exploring privacy-focused applications.

mission.text:
The Idea Generator helps you brainstorm privacy use-cases for your next project.
Get inspired by structured prompts and examples.

features.title: Research & Development
features.description: Explore use cases for research and hackathons.

hero.title: Jobs in Privacy
hero.tagline: Find and share privacy-focused job opportunities across the Web3 ecosystem.

mission.text:
Jobs in Privacy connects talent with privacy-focused roles. Post openings,
browse listings, and grow the privacy workforce.

hero.title: Newsletter
hero.tagline: Stay updated with privacy news, research, and ecosystem updates from the Web3Privacy community.

mission.text:
Our newsletter brings curated privacy news, research highlights, and ecosystem updates
to your inbox. No spam, only signal.

hero.title: Pagency Framework
hero.tagline: Framework for private use-case ideation and design. Build privacy-first applications.

mission.text:
Pagency provides a structured approach to ideating and designing privacy-preserving use cases.
Use it for hackathons, research, or product development.

features.title: Use-Case Framework
features.description: Structured methodology for privacy use cases.

hero.title: Personal Stacks
hero.tagline: Create and share your personal privacy stack. Show which tools and projects you use for privacy.

mission.text:
Personal Stacks let you curate and share your privacy toolset. Discover what others use
and showcase your own stack by category.

features.title: Build Your Stack
features.description: Add privacy tools and projects to your personal stack.

features.title: Share & Discover
features.description: Share your stack and explore others.

hero.title: Privacy Audits
hero.tagline: Privacy audit framework and resources. Evaluate and improve privacy posture.

mission.text:
Privacy Audits provide a framework and tools for auditing privacy in projects
and products.

hero.title: Ethereum Privacy Ecosystem
hero.tagline: Report on the Ethereum privacy ecosystem: projects, tools, and trends.

mission.text: The Ethereum Privacy Ecosystem report maps privacy projects, tools, and trends on Ethereum.

hero.title: Privacy Explorer
hero.tagline: Privacy Explorer helps you research and find information about privacy-preserving technologies and projects, categorized by domain and use case.

mission.text: Our mission is to empower individuals and organizations to make informed decisions about privacy-preserving technologies. We do this by providing a comprehensive, up-to-date, and easy-to-use resource for exploring the privacy ecosystem.

features.title: DATA & METRICS
features.subtitle: Dashboard & Explorer
features.description: Explore privacy projects with scoring, categories, and use cases.

features.title: SDK & API
features.subtitle: Integration
features.description: Integrate explorer data into your apps and research.

roadmap.title: Launch of Privacy Explorer alpha version
roadmap.description: Initial release with core project database and scoring.

roadmap.title: New features and integrations
roadmap.description: Extended use cases, API, and community tools.

roadmap.title: Ecosystem expansion
roadmap.description: More networks and collaboration with privacy projects.

testimonials.name: Tadeas K.
testimonials.quote: Privacy Explorer is the go-to resource for anyone building or evaluating privacy tech in Web3.

testimonials.name: Yurii Ravin
testimonials.quote: We built this to give the community a neutral, comprehensive view of the privacy landscape.

hero.title: Privacy Guides
hero.tagline: Curated guides for building and evaluating privacy. Learn best practices.

mission.text:
Privacy Guides offer curated documentation for building and evaluating privacy-preserving
technologies. Contribute on GitHub.

hero.title: Privacy Portal
hero.tagline: Unified hub for privacy resources, news, and community. The main entry point to the Web3Privacy ecosystem.

mission.text:
Privacy Portal unifies Web3Privacy products: Explorer, Stacks, News, Jobs, Academy, and more.
One place to discover, learn, and contribute to privacy.

hero.title: Privacy Tech Awards
hero.tagline: Celebrate and recognize the best privacy-focused projects and contributions in the Web3 ecosystem.

mission.text:
Privacy Tech Awards highlight exceptional privacy projects, research, and contributions.
Community voting and expert jury select winners each year.

features.title: Nominations & Voting
features.description: Nominate projects and vote for your favorites.

features.title: Annual Winners
features.description: Discover past and current award winners.

hero.title: Privacy Radio & Podcast
hero.tagline: Privacy-focused radio and podcast content. Listen to discussions and interviews.

mission.text:
Privacy Radio brings audio content: discussions, interviews, and podcasts
focused on Web3 privacy.

hero.title: Scoring of Privacy Projects
hero.tagline: Methodology and tooling for scoring privacy projects. Transparent, open source.

mission.text:
The Scoring project defines how we evaluate privacy projects. Methodology, tools,
and data are open source on GitHub.

hero.title: Privacy Use-Cases DB
hero.tagline: Database of privacy use-cases for research and development. Structured, searchable.

mission.text:
The Use-Cases DB is a structured collection of privacy use cases for research,
hackathons, and product ideation.

hero.title: ZK Solutions DB
hero.tagline: Database of zero-knowledge solutions and applications. Explore the ZK landscape.

mission.text: ZK Solutions DB maps zero-knowledge projects, tools, and applications in the privacy ecosystem.
